sentences.text: You have reached Jeff to Capital Corporation and Pacific apartments Corporation. If you know your party's extension please dial it. Now, if you do not know your party's extension you may use the companies directory by dialing nine for all residential leasing inquiries. To search the directory by first name press one to search the directory by last name press two. Enter the first few letters of the person's first name followed by the pound key for Q press seven. For Z press nine to exit the name directory press the star key. One that was found for Olga solorzano press one for the previous menu press the star key.
